mapper.insert: insert into book_borrow_detail_image (member_id, borrow_detail_id, borrow_order_id, borrow_order_no, image_id, image_name, image_url, thumb_url, sort_order, image_type, image_status, bind_status, create_staff_id, create_staff_name, created_at) values (#{memberId}, #{borrowDetailId}, #{borrowOrderId}, #{borrowOrderNo}, #{imageId}, #{imageName}, #{imageUrl}, #{thumbUrl}, #{sortOrder}, #{imageType}, 0, #{bindStatus}, #{createStaffId}, #{createStaffName}, now())
mapper.select: select * from book_borrow_detail_image where image_id = #{imageId} and image_status = 0 for update
mapper.update: update book_borrow_detail_image set borrow_detail_id = #{borrowDetailId}, borrow_order_id = #{borrowOrderId}, borrow_order_no = #{borrowOrderNo}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, bind_status = 'BOUND', updated_at = now() where image_id = #{imageId} and member_id = #{memberId} and borrow_detail_id is null and image_status = 0 and bind_status = 'TEMP'
mapper.select: select count(1) from book_borrow_detail_image where borrow_detail_id = #{borrowDetailId} and image_status = 0
select coalesce(max(sort_order), 0) from book_borrow_detail_image where borrow_detail_id = #{borrowDetailId} and image_status = 0
select * from book_borrow_detail_image where borrow_detail_id = #{borrowDetailId} and image_status = 0 order by sort_order asc, id asc
